name: Chanelle Knight
ai_summary: Chanelle Knight is a 22-year-old college student from Covington, GA with tutoring experience across K-12 and early college levels, emphasizing patience and nurturing care. She offers flexible availability around her academic schedule and employs proactive conflict resolution by de-escalating situations and using fun activities to rebuild peer connections.
